371.issue_title: Replace remaining direct state.json reads with IStateReader

cycles.name: C1: enforcement_runner + phase_detection IStateReader injection

deliverables.description: EnforcementRunner.__init__ accepts state_reader: IStateReader; raw reads on lines 39+391 replaced by state_reader.load(branch) field access
ScopeDecoder.__init__ no longer has state_path parameter; _read_state_json() method deleted
detect_phase() no longer has fallback_to_state parameter; all callers (production + tests) updated to drop it

server.py passes state_reader to EnforcementRunner; ScopeDecoder instantiations drop state_path=
Tests that exercised fallback_to_state=True behaviour deleted (not commented out)
All tests for enforcement_runner and phase_detection green
Quality gates on changed files: lint 10.00/10 + pyright pass

cycles.exit_criteria: All 9 deliverables satisfied: EnforcementRunner wired, ScopeDecoder dead code eliminated, FileStateRepository hardened, server.py updated, dead tests removed, remaining tests green, quality gates pass.
